sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 8.5 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.8)

statement.latex: Prove that if$X$is a finite group,$F$is any field, and$M$is a non-trivial irre\-du\-cible$FX$-module then${|X|} _{x X} \, { fix}\,(x) {2} \, M$. { M.\,R.\,Vaughan-Lee} Proved, even with${...} {p} \, M$, where$p$is the least prime divisor of$|G|$\ (R.\,M.\,Guralnick, A.\,Mar\'oti, Adv. Math., { 226}, no.\,1 (2011), 298--308).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
